languages.text: {n}На бугристом лбу предка проступают багровые рытвины, когда его живой глаз гневно сощуривается.{/n} "Вот как. Ответ поразительно напоминает Ювенну. Значит, ее дух живет в веках, а мои начинания угасли. Я буду звать вас наследни{mf|ком|цей}, {name}, но лишь потому, что не вижу иных вариантов... пока". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

traits.locale_text: {n}На бугристом лбу предка проступают багровые рытвины, когда его живой глаз гневно сощуривается.{/n} "Вот как. Ответ поразительно напоминает Ювенну. Значит, ее дух живет в веках, а мои начинания угасли. Я буду звать вас наследни{mf|ком|цей}, {name}, но лишь потому, что не вижу иных вариантов... пока". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

languages.text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

Значит, ее дух живет в веках, а мои начинания угасли. Я буду звать вас наследни{mf|ком|цей}, {name}, но лишь потому, что не вижу иных вариантов... пока". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

So her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no other alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

{n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

languages.text: {n}Unas arrugas carmesíes marcan la abultada frente de tu antepasado y su ojo vivo se entrecierra, enfadado.{/n} «Conque esas tenemos. Su respuesta me recuerda mucho a Juvenna. Veo que su espíritu perdura a través de los silos, mientras que mis propias andanzas han desaparecido. Le llamaré mi hereder{mf|o|a}, {name}, pero solo porque no tengo otra alternativa... por ahora». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».
languages.original_text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}Unas arrugas carmesíes marcan la abultada frente de tu antepasado y su ojo vivo se entrecierra, enfadado.{/n} «Conque esas tenemos. Su respuesta me recuerda mucho a Juvenna. Veo que su espíritu perdura a través de los silos, mientras que mis propias andanzas han desaparecido. Le llamaré mi hereder{mf|o|a}, {name}, pero solo porque no tengo otra alternativa... por ahora». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».

languages.text: {n}你的先祖愤怒地眯起那只血肉之眼，他那嶙峋的额顶上怒张着数道猩红的深纹。{/n}“原来如此。你的回答真是像极了尤文娜。看来她的意志跨越了数个世纪仍未消散，而我所做的一切却已化为乌有。我会称呼你为继承人的，{name}，但只是因为我暂时……别无选择。”{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”
languages.original_text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的先祖愤怒地眯起那只血肉之眼，他那嶙峋的额顶上怒张着数道猩红的深纹。{/n}“原来如此。你的回答真是像极了尤文娜。看来她的意志跨越了数个世纪仍未消散，而我所做的一切却已化为乌有。我会称呼你为继承人的，{name}，但只是因为我暂时……别无选择。”{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”

languages.text: {n}Des sillons écarlates se dessinent sur le front bombé de votre ancêtre alors que son œil organique se plisse sous l'effet de la colère.{/n} « Allons bon, votre réponse me rappelle dangereusement Juvenna. Ainsi, son esprit perdure à travers les siècles tandis que mes propres initiatives ont été réduites à néant. J'accepte de vous appeler {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière}, {name}, mais uniquement parce que je ne vois pas d'alternative... pour l'instant. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »
languages.original_text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}Des sillons écarlates se dessinent sur le front bombé de votre ancêtre alors que son œil organique se plisse sous l'effet de la colère.{/n} « Allons bon, votre réponse me rappelle dangereusement Juvenna. Ainsi, son esprit perdure à travers les siècles tandis que mes propres initiatives ont été réduites à néant. J'accepte de vous appeler {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière}, {name}, mais uniquement parce que je ne vois pas d'alternative... pour l'instant. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »

languages.text: {n}Atanın yumrulu alnında kızıl çizgiler belirirken canlı gözü öfkeyle kısılıyor.{/n} "Öyle mi? Cevabın bana çarpıcı biçimde Juvenna', yı hatırlattı. Demek onun ruhu yüzyıllar boyunca varlığını sürdürürken benim çabalarım hiçliğe karışmış. Sana vâris diyeceğim {name}. Ancak alternatif göremediğimden... Şimdilik." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."
languages.original_text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

Demek onun ruhu yüzyıllar boyunca varlığını sürdürürken benim çabalarım hiçliğe karışmış. Sana vâris diyeceğim {name}. Ancak alternatif göremediğimden... Şimdilik." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."

languages.text: {n}祖先の鈍い額には怒りの眼差しが鋭く光る血色の皺が刻まれていた。{/n}「そうか。君の言葉はユベナを思い起こさせる。彼女の魂は時を超えて生き続けているが、私の努力は虚しく消えてしまった。君に後継者として名乗るが、今は他に選択肢がないだけだ。」{n}セベリアンは突然よろめくが、強い意志で立ち直る。{/n}「今は休む必要がある。」
languages.original_text: {n}Crimson furrows stand out upon your ancestor's lumpen brow as his living eye narrows in anger.{/n} "Is that so? Your response reminds me strikingly of Juvenna. So, her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}祖先の鈍い額には怒りの眼差しが鋭く光る血色の皺が刻まれていた。{/n}「そうか。君の言葉はユベナを思い起こさせる。彼女の魂は時を超えて生き続けているが、私の努力は虚しく消えてしまった。君に後継者として名乗るが、今は他に選択肢がないだけだ。」{n}セベリアンは突然よろめくが、強い意志で立ち直る。{/n}「今は休む必要がある。」

languages.text: {n}Auf der Stirn deines Ahnherren treten blutrote Adern hervor, als er wütend sein organisches Auge zusammenkneift.{/n} "Ist das so? Eure Antwort erinnert mich stark an Juvenna. Ihr Geist hat also die Jahrhunderte überdauert, während meine eigenen Erfolge in Vergessenheit gerieten. Ich werde Euch {mf|Erbe|Erbin} nennen, {name}, allerdings nur, weil es mir an Alternativen mangelt ... fürs Erste." {n}Plötzlich wankt Seberian, zwingt sich aber mit schierer Willenskraft, aufrecht stehen zu bleiben.{/n} "Und nun brauche ich Ruhe."

So her spirit endures across the centuries, while my own endeavours have faded to nothing. I shall call you heir, {name}, but only because I see no other alternative... for now." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."
